problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
